playerName.description: Name of the player creating the match.

visibility.description: Optional match visibility. Defaults to private/share-link mode.

damageMode.description: Compatibility-only runtime override. Canonical v1.0 rule authority belongs to match params `modeDamagePersistence`, not `gameOptions.damageMode`.

startingLifepoints.description: Compatibility-only runtime override for bootstrap surfaces. Canonical v1.0 gameplay is defined by the match params contract, not `gameOptions.startingLifepoints`.

classicDeployment.description: Compatibility-only runtime override for deployment bootstrap. Canonical v1.0 rule authority belongs to `modeClassicDeployment` in the match params.

quickStart.description: Compatibility-only bootstrap shortcut. If true, runtime may skip deployment and pre-fill the battlefield, but canonical v1.0-compliant matches keep this disabled.

rngSeed.description: Fixed seed for deterministic deck shuffling.

opponent.description: Type of opponent to match against.

rows.description: Number of ranks per column (§3.3). Min: 1, Max: 12. rows × columns ≤ 48.

columns.description: Number of columns per player board (§3.3). Min: 1, Max: 12. rows × columns ≤ 48.

maxHandSize.description: Maximum hand size. Must be ≤ columns (§3.3).

initialDraw.description: Cards drawn at match start. Must equal rows × columns + columns (§3.3).

mode.description: Classic schema binding mode (§3.1). strict: all top-level parameters must exactly match the classic template. hybrid: classic values serve as defaults, top-level may override within Global System Constraints.

msgId.description: Unique transport message identifier used for ACK/replay.

traceparent.description: Optional W3C traceparent header propagated through the WebSocket message.

tracestate.description: Optional W3C tracestate header propagated through the WebSocket message.

baggage.description: Optional W3C baggage header propagated through the WebSocket message.

qaRunId.description: Optional QA run identifier used to correlate simulator-driven traffic.

sessionId.description: Optional WebSocket session identifier used to distinguish reconnect cycles.

reconnectAttempt.description: Optional reconnect attempt counter for the current WebSocket session.

originService.description: Optional source service name that emitted the WebSocket message.

telemetry.description: Optional telemetry envelope for propagating trace context over WebSocket messages.

oneOf.description: Request to create a new match. Reliable client message; requires msgId.

matchId.description: UUID of the match to join.

traceparent.description: Optional W3C traceparent header propagated through the WebSocket message.

sessionId.description: Optional WebSocket session identifier used to distinguish reconnect cycles.

originService.description: Optional source service name that emitted the WebSocket message.

telemetry.description: Optional telemetry envelope for propagating trace context over WebSocket messages.

oneOf.description: Request to join an existing match as the second player. Reliable client message; requires msgId.

matchId.description: UUID of the match to rejoin.

playerId.description: Player secret ID obtained during initial join/creation.

msgId.description: Unique transport message identifier used for ACK/replay.

traceparent.description: Optional W3C traceparent header propagated through the WebSocket message.

tracestate.description: Optional W3C tracestate header propagated through the WebSocket message.

baggage.description: Optional W3C baggage header propagated through the WebSocket message.

qaRunId.description: Optional QA run identifier used to correlate simulator-driven traffic.

sessionId.description: Optional WebSocket session identifier used to distinguish reconnect cycles.

reconnectAttempt.description: Optional reconnect attempt counter for the current WebSocket session.

originService.description: Optional source service name that emitted the WebSocket message.

telemetry.description: Optional telemetry envelope for propagating trace context over WebSocket messages.

oneOf.description: Re-establish connection to an active match. Reliable client message; requires msgId.

msgId.description: Unique transport message identifier used for ACK/replay.

traceparent.description: Optional W3C traceparent header propagated through the WebSocket message.

tracestate.description: Optional W3C tracestate header propagated through the WebSocket message.

baggage.description: Optional W3C baggage header propagated through the WebSocket message.

qaRunId.description: Optional QA run identifier used to correlate simulator-driven traffic.

sessionId.description: Optional WebSocket session identifier used to distinguish reconnect cycles.

reconnectAttempt.description: Optional reconnect attempt counter for the current WebSocket session.

originService.description: Optional source service name that emitted the WebSocket message.

telemetry.description: Optional telemetry envelope for propagating trace context over WebSocket messages.

oneOf.description: Join a match as a spectator. Reliable client message; requires msgId.

cardId.description: ID of the card to deploy from hand.

msgId.description: Reliable transport message identifier for ACK/replay.

expectedSequenceNumber.description: Client freshness guard for rejecting stale or out-of-order actions.

oneOf.description: Deploy a card from hand. Valid during DeploymentPhase. Each player must alternate deploying cards until the battlefield is full according to match parameters.

attackingColumn.description: Column index containing the attacking card. Must have a non-null card at rank 0.

defendingColumn.description: Target column index on the opponent board.

msgId.description: Reliable transport message identifier for ACK/replay.

expectedSequenceNumber.description: Client freshness guard for rejecting stale or out-of-order actions.

oneOf.description: Declare an attack. Valid during AttackPhase. Requires a card at rank 0 of the attacking column.

msgId.description: Reliable transport message identifier for ACK/replay.

expectedSequenceNumber.description: Client freshness guard for rejecting stale or out-of-order actions.

oneOf.description: Pass the current turn. Valid during AttackPhase. Excessive consecutive or total passes will result in a forfeit.

cardId.description: ID of the card to deploy from hand.

msgId.description: Reliable transport message identifier for ACK/replay.

expectedSequenceNumber.description: Client freshness guard for rejecting stale or out-of-order actions.

oneOf.description: Reinforce a column after cleanup. Valid during ReinforcementPhase. Cards are deployed to the back-most empty rank of the column.

msgId.description: Reliable transport message identifier for ACK/replay.

expectedSequenceNumber.description: Client freshness guard for rejecting stale or out-of-order actions.

oneOf.description: Immediately forfeit the match. Valid in any phase.

damageMode.description: Compatibility-only runtime override. Canonical v1.0 rule authority belongs to match params `modeDamagePersistence`, not `gameOptions.damageMode`.

startingLifepoints.description: Compatibility-only runtime override for bootstrap surfaces. Canonical v1.0 gameplay is defined by the match params contract, not `gameOptions.startingLifepoints`.

classicDeployment.description: Compatibility-only runtime override for deployment bootstrap. Canonical v1.0 rule authority belongs to `modeClassicDeployment` in the match params.

quickStart.description: Compatibility-only bootstrap shortcut. If true, runtime may skip deployment and pre-fill the battlefield, but canonical v1.0-compliant matches keep this disabled.

enabled.description: Whether Classic schema binding is active (§3.1).

mode.description: Classic schema binding mode (§3.1). strict: all top-level parameters must exactly match the classic template. hybrid: classic values serve as defaults, top-level may override within Global System Constraints.

rows.description: Number of ranks (rows) per column. Default: 2. Max: 12 (§3.3).

columns.description: Number of columns per player board. Default: 4. Max: 12 (§3.3).

maxHandSize.description: Maximum hand size. Must be ≤ columns (§3.3). Default: 4.

initialDraw.description: Cards drawn at match start. Formula: rows × columns + columns (§3.3). Default: 12.

classicAces.description: Enable Classic Ace rules: Aces only destroyed by other Aces at rank 0 (§10).

classicFaceCards.description: Enable Classic Face Card rules: J→J, Q→J/Q, K→J/Q/K destruction hierarchy (§11).

damagePersistence.description: Damage mode. classic: no HP persists between turns. cumulative: damage persists (§12).

deployFirst.description: Which player deploys first in DeploymentPhase.

attackFirst.description: Which player attacks first in AttackPhase.

maxConsecutivePasses.description: Maximum consecutive passes before automatic forfeit (§16). Default: 3.

maxTotalPassesPerPlayer.description: Maximum total passes per player before automatic forfeit (§16). Default: 5.

rows.description: Number of ranks per column (§3.3). Min: 1, Max: 12. rows × columns ≤ 48.

columns.description: Number of columns per player board (§3.3). Min: 1, Max: 12. rows × columns ≤ 48.

maxHandSize.description: Maximum hand size. Must be ≤ columns (§3.3).

initialDraw.description: Cards drawn at match start. Must equal rows × columns + columns (§3.3).

modeClassicFaceCards.description: Enable Classic Face Card destruction hierarchy (§11).

modeClassicDeployment.description: Enable Classic Deployment: alternating card placement (§5).

modeQuickStart.description: Reserved compatibility flag for non-standard quick-start bootstrap. Canonical v1.0-compliant matches keep this false.

enabled.description: Enable Special Start Mode: no-attack does not count as pass until first forced reinforcement (§7).

noAttackCountsAsPassUntil.description: Condition for closing the Special Start window. Default: bothPlayersCompletedFirstForcedReinforcement.

deployFirst.description: Which player deploys first in DeploymentPhase.

attackFirst.description: Which player attacks first in AttackPhase.

maxConsecutivePasses.description: Maximum consecutive passes before automatic forfeit (§16).

maxTotalPassesPerPlayer.description: Maximum total passes per player before automatic forfeit (§16).
